bindings.title: @GoogleMagenta: Introducing Magenta RealTime 2 (MRT2): the live music model you can play as an...
bindings.excerpt: Introducing Magenta RealTime 2 (MRT2): the live music model you can play as an instrument. MRT2 offers MIDI and prompt controls, and runs natively on a MacBook with <200ms latency. Open weights. Open source inference engine. Suite of apps and plugins. Hear what it can do and try it out for yourself below 🧵
bindings.source_title: @GoogleMagenta: Introducing Magenta RealTime 2 (MRT2): the live music model you can play as an...

Hear what it can do and try it out for yourself below 🧵

bindings.title: @emilkowalski: To get good animations from an AI you need to get good at telling it what you...
bindings.excerpt: To get good animations from an AI you need to get good at telling it what you want: - "stagger this list of items" - "make this animation direction-aware" - "spacial consistency", "crossfade", "layout animation", I made a motion vocabulary for this: http://animations.dev/vocabulary

bindings.title: @AodenTeoMT: Today, we’re excited to introduce Miso One, the most emotive voice model in the...
bindings.excerpt: Today, we’re excited to introduce Miso One, the most emotive voice model in the world.
bindings.source_title: @AodenTeoMT: Today, we’re excited to introduce Miso One, the most emotive voice model in the...
bindings.source_summary: Today, we’re excited to introduce Miso One, the most emotive voice model in the world. Miso One is an 8-billion-parameter text-to-speech model for highly expressive speech generation. It emotes like a human and responds faster than a human, with just 110 milliseconds of latency. We’ve open-sourced the model weights, with API access coming soon. Hear how Miso One sounds in the thread below.

bindings.title: @Ilaria__Manco: Really proud to share something we’ve been working on for a while: Magenta...
bindings.excerpt: Really proud to share something we’ve been working on for a while: Magenta RealTime 2 (MTR2), a live music model that is highly interactive (MIDI, audio, text, lots of parameters) and low-latency (~200ms end-to-end), and runs locally on a MacBook!

bindings.excerpt: Introducing Agent Cookie. 🥷🏻🍪 For anyone running @OpenClaw or @NousResearch's Hermes on a Mac mini: I kept finding my agent logged out of everything, and it sucked. So I fixed it. "Add this to my Amazon cart." Sorry, logged out again. "Order my usual on Instacart." Nope, not logged in anymore. The fix: your laptop's cookies, CLI tokens, and API keys sync...
bindings.source_title: @mvanhorn: Introducing Agent Cookie. 🥷🏻🍪 For anyone running @OpenClaw or @NousResearch's...
bindings.source_summary: Introducing Agent Cookie. 🥷🏻🍪 For anyone running @OpenClaw or @NousResearch's Hermes on a Mac mini: I kept finding my agent logged out of everything, and it sucked. So I fixed it. "Add this to my Amazon cart." Sorry, logged out again. "Order my usual on Instacart." Nope, not logged in anymore. The fix: your laptop's cookies, CLI tokens, and API keys sync to your Mac mini. Continuously. Encrypted end-to-end over your Tailscale tailnet. No logging in twice. 🌐 http://agentcookie.dev

bindings.title: @DraftedAI: 1/4 Most people spend their lives living in buildings they had little influence...
bindings.excerpt: 1/4 Most people spend their lives living in buildings they had little influence over.
bindings.source_title: @DraftedAI: 1/4 Most people spend their lives living in buildings they had little influence...
bindings.source_summary: 1/4 Most people spend their lives living in buildings they had little influence over. We believe AI can help change that. Over the last month, 120,000 people generated 325,000+ home designs with http://Drafted.ai Today, we're excited to share that we've raised a $16M Seed led by Buckley Ventures to continue building multimodal generative models for residential architecture and spatial design. Here's a glimpse of what we're building:
